subcodes.first_line: Remember then My servant, that he may glory amongst all peoples, and verily My remembrance of him is better for him than whatsoever hath been created between the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عبدی لیفتخر به بین العالمین و ان ذکری ایاه خیر له عما خلق بین السموات
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
